blockers.description: Error message format: narwhals 'Check X failed.' vs native '<Schema Column...> failed validation X'. Multiple tests assert exact native strings.
blockers.workaround: Use CONFIG.use_narwhals_backend conditional to select which expected string to assert. Pattern already established in test_pyspark_check.py and test_pyspark_config.py.

decisions.decision: Narwhals backend should align with other narwhals backends, not old PySpark backend
decisions.rationale: User confirmed. Old PySpark was nonstandard.

decisions.decision: dtype comparison: use standard narwhals engine path, no is_pyspark branch
decisions.rationale: User confirmed. PySpark nw.Int32 maps cleanly via narwhals.

decisions.decision: Error message format differences: use backend-conditional expected values in tests, NOT xfail
decisions.rationale: Narwhals format IS correct behavior. xfail implies bug; conditional assertion is correct.

decisions.decision: Do NOT add is_pyspark branches in narwhals backend code
decisions.rationale: Carried from previous session. Accept limitations or fix tests.

decisions.decision: SC2c: scope out row-index in failure_cases for PySpark
decisions.rationale: PySpark has no native integer row index.

decisions.decision: df.pandera.schema accessor not maintained by narwhals backend (no add_schema call)
decisions.rationale: Polars/ibis don't have the pandera accessor either. PySpark-native-only feature.

decisions.decision: @register_input_datatypes is PySpark-native-only; narwhals backend intentionally more permissive, aligned with Ibis. Backlog item 999.1 added to relax native backend eventually.
decisions.rationale: ge/lt/le restricted to numeric+date only in native PySpark backend. Ibis and narwhals impose no such restrictions. xfail is correct behavioral difference.

decisions.decision: _xfail_narwhals_type_restriction defined at module level before TestGreaterThanEqualToCheck class, shared across 5 classes
decisions.rationale: DRY — same mark reused in get_data_param of 5 classes without redefining inside each method.
